title: Adven� Mendici.
content:
Hark, hark, the dogs do bark,
	 The beggars have come to town;
	 Some in rags and some in jags,
	 And some in velvet gowns.

	        En! cum canum latratu,
	        Et multo ululatu;
	    Veniunt mendici repentes,
	        Egeni, pannosi,
	        Squalentes, exosi,
	    Vel sericas togas gerentes.
meaning:
"Adven� Mendici." is a quintessential example of Jacob Bigelow's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
